queries.q: What is the memory limit? Answer with just the value.
How many replicas? Answer with just the number.
Is auth required for the /charge route? Answer yes or no.
What is the value of env RETRIES? Answer with just the number.
Is the legacy_api flag on? Answer yes or no.
How many routes use method POST? Answer with just the number.
Does the 2nd route in the list require auth? Answer yes or no.
How many routes do NOT require auth? Answer with just the number.
What is the value of env STRIPE_MODE? Answer with just the value.
Is there an env var named MAX_CONN? Answer yes or no.
